info.title: Drilling OMS API
info.description:
Operations Management System API for drilling companies.

**Authentication:** Laravel Sanctum Bearer token. Call `POST /auth/login` first, then set the token on protected requests.

**Response envelope:** Most endpoints return success, message, and data fields.
Paginated lists also include `meta` with `current_page`, `last_page`, `per_page`, `total`.

get.summary: Daily reports summary for a date
BHA tools for a daily report

post.summary: Set or update rig material stock

bearerAuth.description: Token from POST /auth/login. Header Authorization Bearer {token}
